ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the match */,
  "team_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "score_team_1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team_2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type (e.g., Bottom Playoff, Middle Playoff, Semi Final) */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament stage */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES tournament_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_1") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_2") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type (e.g., Bottom Playoff, Middle Playoff, Semi Final) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament stage */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the team */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses by the team */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES tournament_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, organizer, coach) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access event (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related match */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the official is assigned to */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "official_role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, assistant referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
